query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.subscription_plan_id, c.stripe_customer_id, c.stripe_subscription_id, c.subscription_status, sp.name as plan_name FROM companies c LEFT JOIN subscription_plans sp ON c.subscription_plan_id = sp.id ORDER BY c.id;
